/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc   -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/src/Main_CUDA.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Time_Integration_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Flux_Calculations_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Gradient_Calculation_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Viscous_Flux_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Geometry_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Linear_Algebra_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Iterative_Solver_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Advanced_Optimizations_Cuda.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/src/Globals_Stub_GPU.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcuda -lcudart -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
